gestures.mdmPrompt: a tutor stands with arms open wide, gently stepping toward the class while enthusiastically introducing subtraction with the minus sign
a person tilts their head slightly and gestures with one hand, as if showing a number fading away while explaining the minus sign
a tutor crouches down, mimicking picking up three imaginary apples and then moves one hand outward, simulating giving one apple away
a person turns to the side, raising both arms in a questioning gesture while inviting the learners to think about how many apples are left
a tutor steps back excitedly, extending both arms as if presenting five blocks while encouraging everyone to start their subtraction practice
a person claps their hands together and points forward, encouraging learners to count the remaining blocks after their subtraction
a tutor raises both arms high, smiling broadly while celebrating the students' progress in learning subtraction and reminding them of the minus sign
a person gestures enthusiastically toward a model of different objects, inviting everyone to keep practicing subtraction at home with various items
